name: Boss is mad I filed workers comp for fall in Taylorsville, firing me legal?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed workers comp for fall in Taylorsville, firing me legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, retaliation illegal in UT; document and report.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah prohibits retaliation for filing valid workers' comp claims; it's illegal discharge.[1] Document threats, report to Labor Commission.[1] Key factors: (1) Prove filing caused action; (2) Light duty refusal differs; (3) Unemployment may apply; (4) Timing key evidence.[1] Keep records of interactions, file retaliation claim. Protection exists—don't fear asserting rights.

description: No, retaliation illegal in UT; document and report.[1]
